Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sandviper sect]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Sandviper sect is an ally of the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — The Sandviper sect has a young chief named Kral.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — The Sandviper sect members use venomous aura and green madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon and Yerin wore Sandviper sect outfits to infiltrate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — The Sandviper sect is led by a chief.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — The Sandviper sect uses the Bloodforged Iron body for its initiates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — The Sandviper sect is a half-civilized sect located in the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — The Sandviper sect is a group that includes Gokren.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
